data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the 'Returns [date]' messaging is not directly supported by the evidence provided. While the linked use case describes the seasonal availability of the ski instructor, it lacks concrete API endpoints or entities that demonstrate how this messaging is implemented. The absence of specific evidence to confirm or deny the requirement leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities that implement 'Returns [date]' messaging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the 'Returns [date]' messaging requirement.
